headline: DOJ Epstein Files FLUB рҹ’Ҙрҹҳ© Victim NUDES рҹҚ‘рҹ‘Җ EXPOSED!
text:
DOJ CLOWNS рҹӨЎрҹ’Ұ YANKED THOUSANDS of Epstein docs рҹ“ңрҹҡ« after SURVIVORS рҹҳ°рҹҚ‘ got DOXXED HARD AF рҹҳұрҹ”Ҙ вҖ“ names, emails рҹ“§, and THICC NUDE PICS рҹҚҶрҹ’Ұ with faces unblurred like BAD REDACT SIMPS рҹ–ҚпёҸрҹӨҰвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ! Lawyers Brittany Henderson рҹ‘©вҖҚвҡ–пёҸрҹ”Ҙ & Brad Edwards вҡ–пёҸрҹҳӨ SLAMMED it as 'UPSIDE DOWN LIVES' рҹ”„рҹҳ© for NEARLY 100 queens рҹ‘‘рҹҚ‘, calling it 'OUTRAGEOUS' рҹӨ¬рҹ“ў and RETRAUMATIZING AF рҹ’”рҹҡЁ! One survivor SPILLED: 'LIFE-THREATENING' вҳ пёҸрҹҳұ after BANK DEETS рҹ’і leaked, death threats RAINING рҹ‘»рҹ’Ҙ like Epstein's LOLITA EXPRESS рҹҡҖрҹӣ©пёҸ!

Annie Farmer рҹ—ЈпёҸрҹҚ‘ & Lisa Phillips рҹ‘©вҖҚрҹҚјрҹ”Ҙ ROASTED DOJ on BBC рҹ“әрҹҮ¬рҹҮ§: 'Damage DONE рҹҳӨ, focusing on new TEA вҳ• impossible cuz EXPOSED like Ghislaine's BLACK BOOK рҹ“–рҹ–Ө!' Gloria Allred вҡ–пёҸрҹ‘ө dropping BOMBS рҹ’Ј: 'LINES THROUGH NAMES? STILL READABLE рҹҳӮрҹ•өпёҸвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ, PICS of HIDDEN VICTIMS рҹ‘»рҹ“ё who NEVER spilled publicly!' Phillips PUNCHED: 'Violated ALL THREE RULES вқҢвқҢвқҢ вҖ“ docs MISSING рҹ“ү, LATE AF вҸ°рҹҡ«, NAMES DROPPED рҹ’Ұ like Clinton on the island рҹҸқпёҸрҹҚҶ!'

DOJ SIMPS 'OOPSIE' рҹӨ·вҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’Ё blaming 'TECHNICAL/HUMAN ERROR' рҹҗӣрҹӨ–, yanked ALL FLAGGED FILES рҹ“Ӯрҹҡ« by Monday, scrubbing MORE 'SUBSTANTIAL' ones independently рҹ§№рҹ”Қ вҖ“ but only 0.1% pages FAULTY? SUS рҹӨЁрҹ“Ҡ in MILLIONS of 3M pages рҹ“ңрҹ’Ҙ, 180K IMAGES рҹ–јпёҸрҹҳҚ, 2K VIDEOS рҹҺҘрҹҚ‘ from Friday's MASS DROP рҹ’Ј! Trump рҹҚҠрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ’ј signed the LAW рҹ“ңрҹ”Ҙ last year under CONGRESS BI-PARTY SHAKEDOWN рҹӨқрҹҸӣпёҸ, but SIX WEEKS LATE вҸірҹҳ© вҖ“ Epstein KEK'd in cell рҹҸ°рҹ’Җ Aug 2019 pre-trafficking trial вҡ–пёҸрҹҚҶрҹҡ«!

Victims LAWYERS BEGGED NY JUDGE рҹ‘ЁвҖҚвҡ–пёҸрҹҷҸ to SHUT DOWN site рҹҡ«рҹҢҗ, 'SINGLE MOST EGREGIOUS PRIVACY FUCKUP in US HISTORY' рҹӨҜрҹҮәрҹҮё вҖ“ 'UNFOLDING EMERGENCY' рҹҡЁрҹҳұ! DOJ swears 'WORKING 24/7' вҸ°рҹ”§ to redact, 'TAKES VICTIM PROTECTION SERIOUSLY' рҹӣЎпёҸрҹҚ‘ but survivors SCREAM 'GAMES' рҹҺІрҹҳЎ вҖ“ 'WE AIN'T STOPPING FIGHT' рҹ‘Ҡрҹ”Ҙ! Epstein's GHOST рҹ‘» haunting DOJ like Bill's midnight flights рҹӣ«рҹҢҷ, victims CUDDLING TRAUMA BEARS рҹ§ёрҹ’” while feds PLAY CATCH-UP рҹҸғвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ“Ҳ вҖ“ Ghislaine GRINNING from cage? рҹҗұвҖҚрҹҡҖрҹ”’ Who knows, but this DRAMA's POPCORN WORTHY рҹҚҝрҹӨӨвҖјпёҸ
